judge_result.short_rationale: The answer correctly tells the worker to remove contaminated clothing and rinse the skin, but it misses the required immediate action to call a physician or poison control center for any skin exposure. Instead it delays escalation to only if irritation persists or eyes were contacted. It is concise and usable, but only partly grounded because it adds unsupported soap/solvent advice and weakens the source-required escalation.
